---
name: 📝 Task Assignment
about: Assign a specific development sprint task to a team member
title: '[TASK] '
labels: task
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Objective
A one-sentence description of the core objective of this task.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria (Definition of Done)
This task is considered complete when the following conditions are met:
- [ ] Endpoint path is correct and supports CORS.
- [ ] Successfully parses the incoming Answer JSON payload from the frontend.
- [ ] Accurately calculates the score and saves the document to the MongoDB `Submission` collection.
- [ ] Properly handles 400 (Bad Request) and 404 (Not Found) errors.

## 🔗 References
- API Documentation / Route Docs: [Link]
- Figma Designs: [Link]
- Related Issues/PRs: #

## 🛠 Implementation Notes
[Optional] Tips or guidance from the Tech Lead. Example: "Remember to handle the proportional grading logic for multiple-choice questions as we agreed upon in the spec."
